'''Fohlg''' was a [[Quarren/Legends|Quarren]] [[Gender/Legends|male]].

==Biography==
Fohlg was the [[caretaker]] for the [[Cambriele Exploration Auditorium]], following the years after the [[Invasion of Naboo/Legends|Invasion of Naboo]]. He was also known to many others as an access point to the museum's archives. Fohlg could be bribed and would allow people access to the museum's galactic database. At some point, he became a [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]].

{{Char-stub}}
